===Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure!=== [[File:Cynthia DPA.png|thumb|150px|Cynthia in Diamond and Pearl Adventure!]] Cynthia first appears in ''[[DPA07|Dialga's Secret Keys!]]'', where she rescues [[Hareta]] from a {{tc|Team Galactic Grunt}}. Afterwards, she tells him and [[Mitsumi]] about the legends of Celestic Town and the Legendary Pokémon in Sinnoh. She reappears in ''[[DPA23|A New Battle Begins!]]'' as a member of the Pokémon League, challenging Mitsumi. Even though Mitsumi gets the upper hand, she decides to resign, as it would make things better for Hareta. ====Pokémon==== {{anchor|Garchomp 2}}{{TrainerPoké |main=yes |trainer=Cynthia |pkmn=Garchomp |gender=female |type1=Dragon |type2=Ground |img=Cynthia Garchomp DPA.png |epnum=DPA07 |epname=Dialga's Secret Keys |desc=While in Celestic Town, Cynthia sent out her {{p|Garchomp}} to show off her power to Hareta. In ''[[DPA23|A New Battle Begins]]'', she was up against [[Mitsumi]]'s {{p|Infernape}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Cynthia |pkmn=Lucario |type1=Fighting |type2=Steel |img=Cynthia Lucario DPA.png |epnum=DPA23 |epname=A New Battle Begins |desc={{p|Lucario}} was used in the Pokémon League where it faced off against Mitsumi's {{p|Electivire}}.
None of Lucario's moves are known.}} Cynthia has at least one other Pokémon, as she participated in the first round of the [[Sinnoh League]] which is a 3 on 3 Single Battle. ====Achievements==== =====Badges obtained===== *Eight unknown badges (prior to ''[[DPA23|A New Battle Begins!]]'') =====Pokémon League===== Cynthia has competed in the following [[Pokémon League]]s: *[[Sinnoh League]] - At least top 8 (''[[DPA23|A New Battle Begins!]]'')
